summary: Iteration 265 - Consolidation Testing Complete. All features working correctly: Dashboard council_glance section with tier/Dust/tools, View All button navigating to /sovereigns, Landing page 7 pillars including Sovereign Council, SmartDock Consult overlay, /sovereigns page with 10 council members, and all backend APIs.
context_for_next_testing_agent: Iteration 265 consolidation complete. Dashboard shows Council Glance widget with Seeker tier, 21 Dust, 0/5 tools. Landing page has 7 pillars including Sovereign Council with 6 highlights. SmartDock Consult button (Shield icon) opens overlay with context-aware sovereign selection. /sovereigns page displays all 10 council members (5 advisors + 5 faculty). Backend APIs all working: /api/sovereigns/list returns 10 members with user_tier, dust_balance, utilities_owned. /api/sovereigns/chat returns AI responses with tiered knowledge depth.

dashboard_council_glance.details: Section renders with tier name (Seeker), Dust balance (21), tools owned (0/5), council quick-access pills (Architect, Harmonic, Economist, Star-Mapper, Silent)

landing_page_pillars.details: 7 category pillars found including Sovereign Council pillar with 6 highlights (Council Advisors, Economy & Dust, Academy, Trade Circle, Cosmic Map, Archives)

smartdock_consult.details: SmartDock found with Consult button (Shield icon). Clicking opens SovereignConsultOverlay

sovereigns_page.details: Page loads with 10 council member cards (5 advisors + 5 faculty), council stats, protocol info

backend_sovereigns_list.details: GET /api/sovereigns/list returns 10 council members with user_tier, dust_balance, utilities_owned/total

backend_sovereigns_chat.details: POST /api/sovereigns/chat returns AI response with knowledge_tier and bridges array

page_sovereign_map.details: PAGE_SOVEREIGN_MAP covers 70+ routes mapping to relevant sovereigns

economy_group_actions.details: ALL_ACTIONS includes Economy group with 6 items: Council, Economy, Academy, Cosmic Map, Observatory, Archives
